home.bioParagraph1: For Phượng, art has no boundaries. It flows from the marks made on canvas — through oil, watercolour, and charcoal — into the spaces we inhabit and the quiet moments of everyday life. Painting is her primary language: a way of recording a feeling before it fades.
home.bioParagraph2: She begins with observation — a cast of light, the geometry of a familiar room, a moment held just before it shifts. Each work is built through patient revision, the materials chosen for how they will live on a wall for years.
home.aboutQuote: Painting is the architecture of stillness.

about.label: About
about.heading: The Hand Behind
about.quote: Painting is the architecture of stillness.
about.bioParagraph1: For Phượng, art has no boundaries. It flows from the marks made on canvas — through oil, watercolour, and charcoal — into the spaces we inhabit and the quiet moments of everyday life. Painting is her primary language: a way of recording a feeling before it fades.
about.bioParagraph2: She works in oil on canvas and watercolour on cotton paper, drawn to the raw directness of oil and the luminous transparency of watercolour. Each series grows from close observation — a quality of light, the geometry hidden in familiar rooms, a suspended moment before something changes.
about.statementQuote: I am not painting subjects — I am painting time. Each layer holds a breath, a hesitation, a revision. What I hope a viewer finds in front of a finished piece is not a picture, but the stillness I was reaching for when I made it.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: A Quiet
contact.intro: For inquiries about available work, commissions, or studio visits — please reach out using one of the channels below.

collections.label: Collections
collections.heading: The
collections.tagline: A journey through the evolving series and themes of a single hand.
collections.inquiryBody: Each work originates from the same hand, yet every series carries its own concerns. Browse the full catalogue or get in touch about a specific piece.
